candidates.name: Gong Call Follow-up Email Drafter
candidates.pitch: Uses the Gong API to pull call summaries and drafts personalized follow-up emails with key points and next steps. Freemium tier limits drafts per month. Targets sales teams who live in Gong.
candidates.pain: Sales reps spend 20+ minutes writing follow-up emails after calls instead of moving to the next call.

candidates.name: Email Signature Consistency Auditor
candidates.pitch: Scans outgoing Gmail for signature inconsistencies and suggests corrections based on team templates stored in a simple config. Flags when reps deviate from brand guidelines.
candidates.pain: Sales teams send emails with inconsistent signatures, undermining professional brand credibility.

candidates.name: PR Story Point Calibrator
candidates.pitch: Uses diff size, cyclomatic complexity, and test coverage to suggest story points with confidence intervals. Built as a simple overlay panel on GitHub PR pages. Most teams struggle with estimation cons
candidates.pain: Engineers spend too long debating story points during sprint planning instead of focusing on actual work.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GCP Resource Right-Sizing Recommender
candidates.pitch: Pulls from GCP Billing API to analyze resource utilization and suggests downsize recommendations. Shows potential savings per instance. Built as a dashboard overlay for the GCP Console.
candidates.pain: Engineering teams overspend on cloud resources because they don't have visibility into actual utilization patterns.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GCP Invoice Anomaly Alert
candidates.pitch: Monitors GCP billing data feeds and alerts when spend deviates significantly from baseline trends. Configurable thresholds per project or service. Desktop notification when anomalies appear.
candidates.pain: Finance teams discover cloud billing surprises only at month-end instead of catching issues in real-time.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Gong Call Objection Density Mapper
candidates.pitch: Runs client-side on Gong transcripts to build a heatmap of objection types by deal stage. Simple NLP clustering on the frontend with local storage. Positions reps to rehearse top objections before sim
candidates.pain: Sales reps don't know which objections appear most frequently in their calls until it's too late to prepare.

candidates.name: Sales Prospect Company Culture Scanner
candidates.pitch: Scrapes the target company's careers page, about page, and recent blog posts to surface culture signals like DEI initiatives, remote policies, and value statements. Generates a quick culture brief bef
candidates.pain: Outbound sales reps personalize outreach generically because they can't quickly assess a prospect's company culture.

candidates.name: Code Review Turnaround Timer
candidates.pitch: Tracks PR review response times per reviewer and surfaces historical patterns. Shows expected wait times directly on the GitHub PR page. Helps teams identify bottlenecks and set realistic expectations
candidates.pain: Pull requests stall in review because there's no visibility into when reviewers will actually look at them.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: API Endpoint Compute Cost Estimator
candidates.pitch: Injects timing and payload size data into network requests and estimates cloud compute costs based on average pricing models. Shows cost estimates directly in DevTools network panel.
candidates.pain: Backend developers don't know the compute cost of their endpoints until the bill arrives unexpectedly.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
